name: System Monitor
description: Collects CPU, memory, disk, disk I/O, network, pressure, thermal, battery, and history metrics and renders a peer dashboard.
author: Ricardo <github@nordbyte.de>

collectors.title: Collect system metrics
collectors.description: Samples CPU, memory, disk, disk I/O, network, pressure, thermal, and battery metrics on this node.

commands.name: sample
commands.title: Collect sample
commands.description: Collect and persist one metrics sample.

commands.name: latest
commands.title: Latest metrics
commands.description: Return the latest sample, collecting one if needed.

commands.name: history
commands.title: Metrics history
commands.description: Return downsampled metrics history for charts.

commands.name: panel-data
commands.title: Panel data
commands.description: Return current metrics, summaries, storage status, and chart-ready history.

commands.name: series
commands.title: Metric series
commands.description: Return one downsampled metric series for automation or external dashboards.

commands.name: summary
commands.title: Metric summary
commands.description: Return min, average, and max summaries for a time range.

commands.name: alerts
commands.title: Alert history
commands.description: Return threshold alert events for a time range.

commands.name: export
commands.title: Export metrics
commands.description: Export downsampled metrics history as JSON or CSV.

commands.name: storage
commands.title: Storage status
commands.description: Return SQLite storage size, sample counts, and retention information.

commands.name: cleanup
commands.title: Cleanup history
commands.description: Remove samples older than the configured retention.

commands.name: vacuum
commands.title: Vacuum storage
commands.description: Run SQLite VACUUM after cleanup or large retention changes.

settings.label: Sample interval
settings.description: Preferred sample interval in milliseconds. The host scheduler may clamp very small values.

settings.label: Retention days
settings.description: How many days of SQLite metrics history are kept in the plugin data directory.

settings.label: Max chart points
settings.description: Maximum downsampled points returned for each chart series.

settings.label: Cleanup interval
settings.description: Minimum minutes between automatic retention cleanup runs.

settings.label: Panel auto refresh
settings.description: Default auto-refresh interval used by the WebUI panel.

settings.label: Track disks
settings.description: Collect disk usage from mounted filesystems or drives.

settings.label: Track network interfaces
settings.description: Collect network byte counters and throughput.

settings.label: Track disk I/O
settings.description: Collect disk throughput, IOPS, busy percentage, queue depth, and latency where supported.

settings.label: Track inodes
settings.description: Collect inode usage on Unix-like systems.

settings.label: Track thermals
settings.description: Collect thermal sensor values where available.

settings.label: Track battery
settings.description: Collect battery percentage and charging state where available.

settings.label: Track processes
settings.description: Collect top CPU/RAM processes and mark known agent processes.

settings.label: Max processes
settings.description: Maximum number of top processes to keep per sample.

settings.label: Silenced alert labels
settings.description: Comma-separated alert labels that should not be shown or stored as alert events.

settings.label: CPU alert threshold
settings.description: Show an alert when CPU usage reaches this percentage.

settings.label: Memory alert threshold
settings.description: Show an alert when real memory usage reaches this percentage.

settings.label: Disk alert threshold
settings.description: Show an alert when disk or inode usage reaches this percentage.

settings.label: Swap alert threshold
settings.description: Show an alert when swap usage reaches this percentage.

settings.label: I/O wait alert threshold
settings.description: Show an alert when CPU I/O wait reaches this percentage.

settings.label: Disk busy alert threshold
settings.description: Show an alert when a disk is busy above this percentage.

settings.label: Critical alert threshold
settings.description: Show critical severity when a percentage-based alert reaches this value.
